suite.name: Usuarios

kw.name: Iniciar Sessao API
Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=serverest, url=https://compassuol.serverest.dev, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.
Abre sessão HTTP com a API e inicializa lista de cleanup.

test.name: CT-U01 - Criar usuario administrador com dados validos

kw.name: Criar Usuario Admin
Criar Usuario
Gerar Dados Fake De Usuario
Name
kw.doc: :example: 'John Doe'
Gera nome e email únicos via FakerLibrary. Retorna: nome, email

kw.name: Montar Body De Usuario
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.
Constrói payload JSON para POST/PUT /usuarios. Argumentos: nome, email, password, administrador.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://compassuol.serverest.dev/usuarios path_url=/usuarios headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.31.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '107', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"nome": "Darrell Lee", "email": "cvelasquez@example.net", "password": "Test@123", "administrador": "true"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.
POST /usuarios com perfil configurável. Registra _id em USUARIOS_CRIADOS para cleanup automático. Retorna: response, email
Atalho para criar usuário com perfil administrador (administrador=true).

kw.name: Validar Status Code
Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.
Confirma que o status HTTP bate com o esperado.

kw.name: Validar Campo Id Presente
Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.
Confirma que "_id" existe no JSON e não é vazio.

kw.name: Validar Mensagem Exata
Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.
Confirma que o campo "message" do JSON é exatamente o esperado.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Validar Persistencia Do Usuario
Buscar Usuario Por Id
GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://compassuol.serverest.dev/usuarios/IQgnaFuQlE9bYblB path_url=/usuarios/IQgnaFuQlE9bYblB headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.31.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.
GET /usuarios/{id} — retorna response completo.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.
Faz GET /usuarios/{id} e confirma que o email bate com o criado. Útil para garantir que o recurso foi de fato persistido.

kw.name: Buscar Usuario Por Id
GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://compassuol.serverest.dev/usuarios/IQgnaFuQlE9bYblB path_url=/usuarios/IQgnaFuQlE9bYblB headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.31.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.
GET /usuarios/{id} — retorna response completo.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

test.doc: Verifica que POST /usuarios cria um administrador com sucesso. Confirma status 201, presença de _id, message exata e persistência via GET.

test.name: CT-U02 - Rejeitar criacao de usuario com email ja cadastrado

kw.name: Criar Usuario Admin
Criar Usuario
Gerar Dados Fake De Usuario
Name
kw.doc: :example: 'John Doe'
Gera nome e email únicos via FakerLibrary. Retorna: nome, email

kw.name: Montar Body De Usuario
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.
Constrói payload JSON para POST/PUT /usuarios. Argumentos: nome, email, password, administrador.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://compassuol.serverest.dev/usuarios path_url=/usuarios headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.31.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '103', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"nome": "Brian Reid", "email": "omorris@example.net", "password": "Test@123", "administrador": "true"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.
POST /usuarios com perfil configurável. Registra _id em USUARIOS_CRIADOS para cleanup automático. Retorna: response, email
Atalho para criar usuário com perfil administrador (administrador=true).

kw.name: Validar Status Code
Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.
Confirma que o status HTTP bate com o esperado.

kw.name: Name
kw.doc: :example: 'John Doe'

kw.name: Montar Body De Usuario
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.
Constrói payload JSON para POST/PUT /usuarios. Argumentos: nome, email, password, administrador.

kw.name: Criar Usuario Com Body Customizado
POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://compassuol.serverest.dev/usuarios path_url=/usuarios headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.31.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '109', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"nome": "Deanna Lawrence", "email": "omorris@example.net", "password": "Test@123", "administrador": "false"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.
POST /usuarios com payload arbitrário (para cenários negativos). Registra _id em USUARIOS_CRIADOS se a resposta for 201. Retorna: response

kw.name: Validar Status E Mensagem
Validar Status Code
Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.
Confirma que o status HTTP bate com o esperado.

kw.name: Validar Mensagem Exata
Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.
Confirma que o campo "message" do JSON é exatamente o esperado.
Combinação: valida status HTTP + campo message exato.

kw.name: Validar Unicidade Do Email
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Buscar Usuarios Com Filtro
GET On Session
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.
GET /usuarios com parâmetros de query — retorna response completo.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.
Filtra /usuarios por email e confirma que há exatamente 1 registro. Útil para garantir que email duplicado não criou segundo registro.

test.doc: Verifica que o segundo cadastro com o mesmo email é rejeitado com 400. Confirma message de duplicidade e que o banco contém apenas 1 registro.

test.name: CT-U03 - Rejeitar criacao de usuario sem campo email obrigatorio

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Criar Usuario Com Body Customizado
POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://compassuol.serverest.dev/usuarios path_url=/usuarios headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.31.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '78', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"nome": "Usuario Sem Email", "password": "Test@123", "administrador": "true"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.
POST /usuarios com payload arbitrário (para cenários negativos). Registra _id em USUARIOS_CRIADOS se a resposta for 201. Retorna: response

kw.name: Validar Status Code
Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.
Confirma que o status HTTP bate com o esperado.

kw.name: Validar Mensagem Contem
Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
Confirma que o campo "message" do JSON contém o trecho esperado. Se "message" não existir, tenta validar em outros campos da resposta.

test.doc: Verifica que payload sem o campo obrigatório "email" retorna 400. A message deve mencionar o campo ausente.

test.name: CT-U09 - GET usuarios com filtro de email inexistente retorna lista vazia

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Buscar Usuarios Com Filtro
GET On Session
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.
GET /usuarios com parâmetros de query — retorna response completo.

kw.name: Validar Status Code
Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.
Confirma que o status HTTP bate com o esperado.

kw.name: Validar Lista Vazia
Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Length Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the length of the given item is correct.
Confirma que o response possui quantidade=0 e array "usuarios" vazio.

test.doc: Verifica que filtro por email sem correspondência retorna 200 com quantidade igual a zero e array de usuários vazio.

test.name: CT-U10 - PUT com ID inexistente realiza UPSERT e cria recurso

kw.name: Name
kw.doc: :example: 'John Doe'

kw.name: Montar Body De Usuario
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.
Constrói payload JSON para POST/PUT /usuarios. Argumentos: nome, email, password, administrador.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Atualizar Usuario Via PUT
PUT On Session
kw.msg: PUT Request : url=https://compassuol.serverest.dev/usuarios/upsert_id_nao_existente_99z path_url=/usuarios/upsert_id_nao_existente_99z headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.31.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '104', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"nome": "Carolyn Lewis", "email": "ian81@example.com", "password": "Test@123", "administrador": "true"}'
kw.doc: Sends a PUT request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.
PUT /usuarios/{id} com body informado — suporta UPSERT. Registra _id retornado em USUARIOS_CRIADOS se resposta for 201. Retorna: response

kw.name: Validar Status E Mensagem
Validar Status Code
Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.
Confirma que o status HTTP bate com o esperado.

kw.name: Validar Mensagem Exata
Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.
Confirma que o campo "message" do JSON é exatamente o esperado.
Combinação: valida status HTTP + campo message exato.

kw.name: Validar Campo Id Presente
Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.
Confirma que "_id" existe no JSON e não é vazio.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Validar Persistencia Do Usuario
Buscar Usuario Por Id
GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://compassuol.serverest.dev/usuarios/e4ot9NTyPpx8t5LW path_url=/usuarios/e4ot9NTyPpx8t5LW headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.31.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.
GET /usuarios/{id} — retorna response completo.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.
Faz GET /usuarios/{id} e confirma que o email bate com o criado. Útil para garantir que o recurso foi de fato persistido.

test.doc: Verifica que PUT /usuarios/{id_inexistente} aplica o comportamento de UPSERT documentado pela ServeRest: cria o recurso e retorna 201.

test.name: CT-U05 - Evidenciar XSS armazenado no campo nome - BUG-01

kw.name: Montar Body De Usuario
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.
Constrói payload JSON para POST/PUT /usuarios. Argumentos: nome, email, password, administrador.

kw.name: Criar Usuario Com Body Customizado
POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://compassuol.serverest.dev/usuarios path_url=/usuarios headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.31.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '123', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"nome": "<script>alert(1)</script>", "email": "cassiearnold@example.net", "password": "Test@123", "administrador": "true"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.
POST /usuarios com payload arbitrário (para cenários negativos). Registra _id em USUARIOS_CRIADOS se a resposta for 201. Retorna: response

kw.name: Registrar Bug Evidenciado
Log
kw.msg: BUG-01 CONFIRMADO: API retornou 201 — payload XSS no campo nome foi persistido no banco
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.arg: API retornou 201 — payload XSS no campo nome foi persistido no banco
kw.doc: Loga um aviso de BUG confirmado quando a API aceita dados inválidos. Usado em testes de evidência (não bloqueante per se, mas o assert final falha).

kw.name: Validar Status Code
Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.
Confirma que o status HTTP bate com o esperado.

test.doc: BUG-01 (Alta severidade): a API aceita script no campo nome e retorna 201 em vez do esperado 400. Este teste FALHA intencionalmente para evidenciar a vulnerabilidade. Referência OWASP: A03:2021 — Injection (Stored XSS).

test.name: CT-U06 - Evidenciar nome com apenas caracteres especiais - BUG-02

kw.name: Montar Body De Usuario
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.
Constrói payload JSON para POST/PUT /usuarios. Argumentos: nome, email, password, administrador.

kw.name: Criar Usuario Com Body Customizado
POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://compassuol.serverest.dev/usuarios path_url=/usuarios headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.31.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '103', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"nome": "@@@@@@", "email": "kristina08@example.net", "password": "Test@123", "administrador": "false"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.
POST /usuarios com payload arbitrário (para cenários negativos). Registra _id em USUARIOS_CRIADOS se a resposta for 201. Retorna: response

kw.name: Registrar Bug Evidenciado
Log
kw.msg: BUG-02 CONFIRMADO: API retornou 201 — nome semanticamente inválido (@@@@@@) foi aceito
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.arg: API retornou 201 — nome semanticamente inválido (@@@@@@) foi aceito
kw.doc: Loga um aviso de BUG confirmado quando a API aceita dados inválidos. Usado em testes de evidência (não bloqueante per se, mas o assert final falha).

kw.name: Validar Status Code
Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.
Confirma que o status HTTP bate com o esperado.

test.doc: BUG-02 (Média severidade): a API aceita nome composto apenas por caracteres especiais (@@@@@@) e retorna 201 em vez de 400. Este teste FALHA intencionalmente para evidenciar o bug.

test.name: CT-U07 - Evidenciar campo nome com string vazia aceito pela API - BUG-01 parcial

kw.name: Montar Body De Usuario
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.
Constrói payload JSON para POST/PUT /usuarios. Argumentos: nome, email, password, administrador.

kw.name: Criar Usuario Com Body Customizado
POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://compassuol.serverest.dev/usuarios path_url=/usuarios headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.31.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '96', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"nome": "", "email": "erikriddle@example.com", "password": "Test@123", "administrador": "true"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.
POST /usuarios com payload arbitrário (para cenários negativos). Registra _id em USUARIOS_CRIADOS se a resposta for 201. Retorna: response

kw.name: Registrar Bug Evidenciado
kw.arg: API retornou 201 — nome vazio foi persistido no banco
kw.doc: Loga um aviso de BUG confirmado quando a API aceita dados inválidos. Usado em testes de evidência (não bloqueante per se, mas o assert final falha).

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Buscar Usuario Por Id
kw.doc: GET /usuarios/{id} — retorna response completo.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Validar Status Code
Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.
Confirma que o status HTTP bate com o esperado.

test.doc: BUG-01 parcial: o campo nome com string vazia deveria retornar 400 mas a API aceita e persiste o registro com nome vazio. Este teste FALHA intencionalmente como evidência do bug.

kw.name: Limpar Usuarios Criados
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
DELETE On Session
kw.msg: DELETE Request : url=https://compassuol.serverest.dev/usuarios/IQgnaFuQlE9bYblB path_url=/usuarios/IQgnaFuQlE9bYblB headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.31.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '0'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a DELETE request on a previously created HTTP Session.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
DELETE On Session
kw.msg: DELETE Request : url=https://compassuol.serverest.dev/usuarios/cqa8PfjMA9Q5JSSi path_url=/usuarios/cqa8PfjMA9Q5JSSi headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.31.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '0'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a DELETE request on a previously created HTTP Session.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
DELETE On Session
kw.msg: DELETE Request : url=https://compassuol.serverest.dev/usuarios/e4ot9NTyPpx8t5LW path_url=/usuarios/e4ot9NTyPpx8t5LW headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.31.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '0'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a DELETE request on a previously created HTTP Session.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
DELETE On Session
kw.msg: DELETE Request : url=https://compassuol.serverest.dev/usuarios/V1Uq6ojHndW3nxPm path_url=/usuarios/V1Uq6ojHndW3nxPm headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.31.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '0'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a DELETE request on a previously created HTTP Session.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
DELETE On Session
kw.msg: DELETE Request : url=https://compassuol.serverest.dev/usuarios/8Rgw81yZbcfVGffF path_url=/usuarios/8Rgw81yZbcfVGffF headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.31.0', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '0'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a DELETE request on a previously created HTTP Session.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.
Remove todos os usuários registrados durante a suite. Idempotente: ignora 404 sem falhar.

suite.doc:
Suite de testes — Domínio /usuarios
Cobertura: CT-U01 · CT-U02 · CT-U03 · CT-U05 · CT-U06 · CT-U07 · CT-U09 · CT-U10
Autor : Eduardo Neves de Souza · Squad 01 · Compass UOL Versão : 2.0 (reorganizado com 1 CT por teste e rastreabilidade completa)
─── REFERÊNCIA DE CASOS ──────────────────────────────────────── CT-U01 POST /usuarios — admin válido [positivo] CT-U02 POST /usuarios — email duplicado [negativo] CT-U03 POST /usuarios — campo email ausente [negativo] CT-U05 POST /usuarios — XSS no campo nome [bug/segurança] CT-U06 POST /usuarios — nome com só especiais [bug/negativo] CT-U07 POST /usuarios — nome vazio [bug/negativo] CT-U09 GET /usuarios — filtro sem correspondência [negativo] CT-U10 PUT /usuarios/:id — UPSERT com ID inexistente [regra de negócio] ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

errors.msg: BUG-01 CONFIRMADO: API retornou 201 — payload XSS no campo nome foi persistido no banco
BUG-02 CONFIRMADO: API retornou 201 — nome semanticamente inválido (@@@@@@) foi aceito
